title: Pixelated epicfight
description: Redraw the texture of the epicfight and turn the model of WeaponsOfMiracles into a pixel model.
body:
## 描述
### WeaponsOfMiracles
- 在我的世界里面太过精细的模型显得十分突兀，[Epicfight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)的附属——[WeaponsOfMiracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles)显然就是这样的，我将它们重绘并变为像素平面模型，以此使它们整体更符合我的世界的风格。
### Epicfigh
- 很显然，[史诗战斗](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)并没有优秀的纹理，而且512x的粒子纹理也使它在mc中有些格格不入，我重绘了它们，并将粒子效果，刀光纹理的像素调为了32x。
## Description
### WeaponsOfMiracles
- Models that are too detailed in minecraft are very abrupt, and WeaponsOfMiracles, which is an accessory to [Epicfigh](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight), is obviously like that, and I redrew them into pixel flat models to make them more minecraft style overall.
### Epicfight
- Obviously, Epic Battles doesn't have great textures, and the 512x particle textures made it a bit out of place in the MC, so I redrew them and turned the particle effects, trail textures to 32x pixels.
